stemHtml: An aircraft enters the NAT HLA Airspace and ATC advises the flight crew to maintain the assigned speed. The PIC knows that the airspace is really busy and there are aircraft all around them. What is his/her first action on entering an area with moderate to severe turbulence?

options.a: Reduce the speed to "rough air airspeed" and thereafter inform ATC.
options.b: Ask ATC for permission to reduce speed.
